testcase.name: testMostCommonFirstNameOfInactiveStudentsPerf

failure.message: Expected speedup to be at least 11.0 but was 2.438311688311688

testcase.failure: junit.framework.AssertionFailedError: Expected speedup to be at least 11.0 but was 2.438311688311688 at junit.framework.Assert.fail(Assert.java:47) at junit.framework.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:20) at co.edu.unal.paralela.StudentAnalyticsTest.testMostCommonFirstNameOfInactiveStudentsPerf(StudentAnalyticsTest.java:118)
